name: Alltemp, Inc.
summary: Alltemp, Inc. develops, markets, and sells commercial refrigerants for the residential and commercial marketplace under the alltemp name. The company offers its technologies as replacement for various worldwide refrigerants that have affected the global environment. Its products have applications in refrigeration, foam insulation, and industrial solvents, as well as in heating, ventilation, and air conditioning. The company was founded in 2015 and is based in Roseburg, Oregon.
